title: Dhammapada, Chapter 8: The Thousands
description: Chapter 8 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 8 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: Better than a thousand useless words is one word that gives peace. Better than a thousand useless verses is one verse that gives peace.
